description_long: This stuffed toy features a large, round, pink body with a smooth, slightly shiny surface. Its face is dominated by two oversized, glossy black eyes that give it a striking, almost alien appearance. The mouth is small and subtle, set low on the face, with no visible nose or eyebrows. The toy has two short, rounded arms and two stubby legs, all colored a deeper reddish-pink than the main body, and positioned in a way that suggests a seated posture. The back of the toy is featureless and smooth, with a slight crease at the base. The overall design is minimalist and whimsical, making it stand out as a unique plush figure in an urban environment.
description: A round, pink stuffed toy with large black eyes, small mouth, and deep reddish-pink limbs, seated in a whimsical pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large black eyes, small mouth, and both arms and legs clearly positioned in a seated pose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the roundness of the head and the protruding arm and leg, with facial features partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a smooth, featureless back with a slight crease at the base and both arms barely visible on the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the round head, protruding arm and leg, and a partial view of the face.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: round pink creature with large black eyes
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with large, glossy black eyes and a small, straight mouth. There are no visible eyebrows or other expressive features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting with both arms and legs bent forward, body upright, and head facing forward.
